title: Borscht Ukrainian Fish Soup
description: A hearty and comforting soup originating from Ukraine, made with a variety of fish and vegetables. Perfect for a cold winter day.

ingredients.name: Revitalizing Broth
ingredients.notes: Use a store-bought or homemade broth

instructions: Heat the broth in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped carrots and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Add the diced potatoes and cook for 10 minutes, or until they start to soften.
Add the fish pieces and cook for 5 minutes, or until they start to flake.
Stir in the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped fresh dill and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Simmer the soup for an additional 10 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with additional dill if desired.
